description: The Ursino are a powerful 'ndrina of the 'Ndrangheta based in Gioiosa Jonica, Calabria, Italy. They are allied with the Aquino, Cordì, and Belfiore clans and have operations in Turin, Liguria, France, Spain, Canada, and England. The clan was involved in the construction of the Port of Gioia Tauro, the murder of anti-mafia activist Rocco Gatto, and the assassination of magistrate Bruno Caccia. They are still active, with recent operations targeting their drug trafficking networks.

country_links.evidence_quote: Gestiva insieme ad altri un traffico di droga dal Sudamerica all' Europa ( Spagna , Paesi Bassi e Albania ) .
country_links.context: The organization routes drugs through Albania as part of a trafficking network from South America to Europe.

country_links.context: The organization is involved in international drug trafficking that includes Belgium as a transit or destination country.
